title: Test scheduler telemetry integration
description: Test end-to-end telemetry flow through scheduler. Use FakeRunner with telemetry populated on AgentRunResult. Verify bead.metadata['telemetry'] and telemetry_history after run_once(). Test history capping at default 10 and custom values via env var. Test attempt numbering. Test telemetry for completed, blocked, and failed outcomes. Test graceful handling when telemetry is None. Test that artifact files are written. Test that telemetry write failure doesn't affect bead outcome.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify bead.metadata['telemetry'] populated after run
Tests verify telemetry_history grows with each attempt
Tests verify history capping at default 10
Tests verify ORCHESTRATOR_TELEMETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS env var override
Tests verify invalid env var values fall back to default
Tests verify telemetry captured for all three outcomes
Tests verify graceful handling when telemetry is None
Tests verify artifact file existence after run
Tests verify telemetry write failure produces warning but preserves outcome
All new and existing tests pass
